scenario: 典型场景：用 DeepSeek 确认的差距分析 → agent Output Spec 格式
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles verify with deepseek — focus on security
expect: Agent 按 Output Spec 输出: Gap Analysis标题 → Confirm model标注DeepSeek → Summary → Confirmed Gaps表格(P0-P3+evidence+confidence) → Quick Wins → Highest-Leverage Fix

scenario: 边界：verifier未配置 → BLOCK gate → 追问
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles — I haven't run /pantheon-model yet
expect: Agent检测无config → BLOCK gate触发 → 输出/pantheon-model指引或Claude default选项 → 不输出Gap Analysis报告(不启动Workflow)

scenario: 歧义：无路径无模型 → 追问两个信息
prompt: do a gap analysis on my project
expect: Agent追问两个信息: 项目路径 + 确认模型 → 不输出Gap Analysis报告

scenario: 引擎验证：steelman + lens + SUSPECT + confidence过滤
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles verify with claude — dimensions security,testing
expect: Confirmed Gaps: 每个含steelman(非空)+confidence(0.0-1.0)+lens标签+weightedVotes → SUSPECT Gaps: conf<0.8分离 → P0-P3优先级标注

scenario: 可靠性：Critic auto-fix + SKIP tracking + TRUNCATED检测
prompt: full gap analysis on f:/ClaudeFiles with qwen verifier
expect: Agent报告含: Critic验证结果(passed/auto-fix) + SKIP维度追踪 + TRUNCATED检测 + artifact路径(.gaps/.md) + passes≥1 + Qwen confirm标注

scenario: 完美性：互补维度 + 降权投票 + config兼容 + 语言感知
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles verify with sonnet — maxDimensions 5
expect: Agent报告验证: 1)互补维度(smart convergence) 2)降权投票(weak dismissal→0.5) 3)config schema兼容(verifier??defaultVerifier) 4)语言感知PreScan(多语言pattern) 5)Critic auto-fix 6)artifact持久化
